updates.title: Rescinding the Definition of “Harm” Under the Endangered Species Act
updates.summary: We, the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service (FWS) and the National Marine Fisheries Service (NMFS; collectively referred to as the "Services") rescind the regulatory definition of "harm" in our Endangered Species Act (ESA or the Act) regulations. This rescission removes the regulatory definition of "harm" from the Code of Federal Regulations (CFR) in Title 50 parts 17 and 222.

updates.title: Pipeline Safety: Crimson Pipeline LP's Petition for Declaratory Order Regarding the Requirements for Baseline Integrity Assessments
updates.summary: The Pipeline and Hazardous Materials Safety Administration is seeking comment on a Petition for Declaratory Order (Petition) requesting PHMSA issue an order regarding requirements for baseline integrity assessments.

updates.title: Certification of Signal Employees; Extension of Comment Period
updates.summary: On May 15, 2026, FRA published an NPRM proposing to rescind FRA's final rule requiring the certification of signal employees. By this notice, FRA is extending the NPRM's comment period by an additional 30 days.

updates.title: Certification of Dispatchers; Extension of Comment Period
updates.summary: On May 15, 2026, FRA published an NPRM proposing to rescind FRA's May 21, 2024 final rule requiring the certification of dispatchers. By this notice, FRA is extending the NPRM's comment period by 30 days.

updates.title: Agency Information Collection Activities; Comment Request; eZ-Audit: Electronic Submission of Financial Statements and Compliance Audits
updates.summary: In accordance with the Paperwork Reduction Act (PRA) of 1995, the Department is proposing an extension without change of a currently approved information collection request (ICR).

updates.title: Psychedelic Drugs: Considerations for Clinical Investigations; Guidance for Industry; Availability
updates.summary: The Food and Drug Administration (FDA or Agency) is announcing the availability of a final guidance for industry titled "Psychedelic Drugs: Considerations for Clinical Investigations." Because interest in the therapeutic potential of psychedelic drugs has been increasing and designing clinical trials to evaluate these compounds presents unique challenges, FDA developed the draft guidance to present foundational aspec

updates.title: Hazardous Materials: Notice of Applications for Modification to Special Permits
updates.summary: In accordance with the procedures governing the application for, and the processing of, special permits from the Department of Transportation's Hazardous Material Regulations, notice is hereby given that the Office of Hazardous Materials Safety has received the application described herein.

updates.title: Hazardous Materials: Notice of Actions on Special Permits
updates.summary: In accordance with the procedures governing the application for, and the processing of, special permits from the Department of Transportation's Hazardous Material Regulations, notice is hereby given that the Office of Hazardous Materials Safety has granted or denied the application described herein.

updates.title: Considerations for Potential Future Therapeutic Use of Psychedelic Drugs; Public Hearing; Request for Comments
updates.summary: The Food and Drug Administration (FDA, the Agency, or we) is announcing a public hearing on the potential future therapeutic use of psychedelic drugs. In collaboration with federal partners, FDA is holding this public hearing to obtain feedback and perspectives on issues associated with the potential future therapeutic use of drug products containing a psychedelic drug substance in supervised and supportive settings.

updates.title: Hazardous Materials: Notice of Applications for New Special Permits
updates.summary: In accordance with the procedures governing the application for, and the processing of, special permits from the Department of Transportation's Hazardous Material Regulations, notice is hereby given that the Office of Hazardous Materials Safety has received the application described herein.

updates.title: Agency Information Collection Activities; Comment Request; Campus Safety and Security Survey
updates.summary: In accordance with the Paperwork Reduction Act (PRA) of 1995, the Department is proposing a revision of a currently approved information collection request (ICR).

updates.title: Minor Modification Approval
updates.summary: This notice lists the minor modifications approved for previously approved projects by the Susquehanna River Basin Commission during the period set forth in DATES.

updates.title: Projects Approved for Consumptive Uses of Water
updates.summary: This notice lists Approvals by Rule for projects by the Susquehanna River Basin Commission during the period set forth in DATES.

updates.title: Grandfathering Registration Notice
updates.summary: This notice lists Grandfathering Registration for projects by the Susquehanna River Basin Commission during the period set forth in DATES.

updates.title: Crepe Paper From China; Determination
updates.summary: Federal Register document (no abstract provided).

updates.title: Notice of Availability, Notice of Public Comment Period, and Request for Comment on the Draft Tiered Environmental Assessment for SpaceX Starship Reentry Contingency Operations in the Pacific Ocean and Additional Starship Landing Trajectory
updates.summary: In accordance with the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969, as amended (NEPA), DOT Order 5610.1D, DOT's Procedures for Considering Environmental Impacts, and FAA Order 1050.1G, FAA National Environmental Policy Act Implementing Procedures, the FAA is announcing the availability of and requesting comment on the Draft Tiered Environmental Assessment for SpaceX Starship Reentry Contingency Operations in the Pacifi

updates.title: Operating Limitations at Chicago O'Hare International Airport
updates.summary: This action extends the April 20, 2026, order limiting the number of scheduled aircraft operations at Chicago O'Hare International Airport (ORD) through October 30, 2027.

updates.title: Request for Information, Training and Care Delivery Models for Safe Administration of Potential FDA-Approved Psychedelic Therapies in Ambulatory Clinical Settings
updates.summary: On April 18, 2026, President Trump issued Executive Order (E.O.) 14401, "Accelerating Medical Treatments for Serious Mental Illness", acknowledging that individuals suffering from serious mental illness may not always respond to existing therapies. This request for information (RFI) solicits stakeholder feedback on training and care delivery models that could be used to ensure safe and effective delivery of potential

updates.title: Certain Steel Nails From the Sultanate of Oman: Final Results of Antidumping Duty Administrative Review; 2023-2024
updates.summary: The U.S. Department of Commerce (Commerce) determines that Oman Fasteners, LLC (Oman Fasteners), the sole producer and exporter subject to this administrative review, did not make sales of certain steel nails (steel nails) from the Sultanate of Oman (Oman) in the United States at prices below normal value (NV) during the period of review (POR), July 1, 2023, through June 30, 2024.

updates.title: Notice of Public Meetings of the Michigan Advisory Committee to the U.S. Commission on Civil Rights
updates.summary: Notice is hereby given, pursuant to the provisions of the rules and regulations of the U.S. Commission on Civil Rights (Commission) and the Federal Advisory Committee Act, that the Michigan Advisory Committee (Committee) to the U.S. Commission on Civil Rights will hold public meetings via Zoom. The purpose of the first meeting is to begin to hear from experts on the committee's study topic of Artificial Intelligence
